videos.title: Inside Look at the Minneapolis World Cup
videos.description:
Super bummed to not be apart of the Minneapolis World Cup but big shoutout to JC for taking over and helping to get some content! Thanks to everyone who supported this historic event and I hope it happens again! 

Store: https://ben-ogden.myshopify.com

Instagram - https://www.instagram.com/ben.0gden
About Me - http://Benogden.org

Produced by Carter Hall
Instagram - https://www.instagram.com/carterwhall
Website - https://www.carterhallmedia.com

Supported By,
Driven Studio - https://www.drivenstudio.com
Image Relay - https://www.imagerelay.com

videos.title: Minnesota Moment: New Loppet Foundation program to be led by Olympian
videos.description:
It's a new opportunity to get kids outside and active in the Twin Cities.

The Loppet Foundation is growing, and on Wednesday, it announced the creation of a new program called Loppet Run 365.

Full Story Here - https://kstp.com/minnesota-moment/minnesota-moment-new-loppet-foundation-running-program-to-be-led-by-olympian-abdi-bile/5505997/
